goal: Visit the public OpenAI news index and extract structured growth signals from recent items. Capture product announcements, funding mentions, and geographic expansion indicators from the visible news items and linked summaries when available. Return jobs as an empty array unless the news item itself explicitly mentions hiring. Return metrics with growth equal to the combined count of product announcements, funding mentions, and expansion indicators.
goal_prompt:
Visit the public OpenAI news index and extract structured growth signals from recent items. Capture product announcements, funding mentions, and geographic expansion indicators from the visible news items and linked summaries when available. Return jobs as an empty array unless the news item itself explicitly mentions hiring. Return metrics with growth equal to the combined count of product announcements, funding mentions, and expansion indicators.

Return only structured JSON that matches this schema exactly:
{"type":"object","required":["captured_at","company","jobs","product_announcements","funding_mentions","expansion_indicators","metrics","map_points"],"properties":{"captured_at":{"type":"string"},"company":{"type":"string"},"jobs":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["title","team","location","timestamp","evidence_url"],"properties":{"title":{"type":"string"},"team":{"type":"string"},"location":{"type":"string"},"timestamp":{"type":"string"},"evidence_url":{"type":"string"}}}},"product_announcements":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["title","published_at","evidence_url"],"properties":{"signal_type":{"type":"string"},"title":{"type":"string"},"product_name":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"},"published_at":{"type":"string"},"evidence_url":{"type":"string"}}}},"funding_mentions":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["title","published_at","evidence_url"],"properties":{"signal_type":{"type":"string"},"title":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"},"published_at":{"type":"string"},"evidence_url":{"type":"string"}}}},"expansion_indicators":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["title","location","published_at","evidence_url"],"properties":{"signal_type":{"type":"string"},"title":{"type":"string"},"location":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"},"published_at":{"type":"string"},"evidence_url":{"type":"string"}}}},"metrics":{"type":"object","required":["growth"],"properties":{"growth":{"type":"number"}}},"map_points":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["latitude","longitude","entity_name","signal_type","severity","timestamp","explanation"],"properties":{"latitude":{"type":"number"},"longitude":{"type":"number"},"entity_name":{"type":"string"},"signal_type":{"type":"string"},"severity":{"type":"string"},"timestamp":{"type":"string"},"explanation":{"type":"string"},"cluster_key":{"type":"string"}}}}}}

Stop conditions:
["Stop after the newest 30 visible news items are processed.","Stop when no new items appear after one pagination cycle.","Stop after two consecutive article extraction failures."]

Structured error handling rules:
{"timeout":{"action":"retry","max_retries":2,"emit_status":"failed"},"layout_changed":{"action":"return_partial_result","emit_status":"failed"},"schema_validation_failed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"validation_error"}}
stop_conditions: Stop after the newest 30 visible news items are processed.
Stop when no new items appear after one pagination cycle.
Stop after two consecutive article extraction failures.
